_meta.description: Mark 10 agony registry terms as XREFs, pointing to their primary registry (anguish-005 or sorrow-154).
_meta.reason: The agony registry (002) contains 13 terms. Of these, 10 appear as primary analysed terms in other completed registries. Per pipeline convention, these should carry a status_note identifying the primary location rather than carrying duplicate analysis. The remaining 3 terms (H8463, H1518, G0931) are unique to agony and are left unchanged.

rows.status_note: XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 70. H2427A (chil) is the masculine form of the chul root cluster; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 154 (sorrow), wa_term_inventory id 447. H2427B (chi.lah) is the feminine form of H2427A; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry. Note: H2427A is primary in registry 005 (anguish) — the two forms are split across different primary registries by root affinity.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 71. H7661 (sha.vats) carries the single occurrence at 2Sa 1:9; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 84. H2256B (che.vel) covers pain/pangs/travail meanings; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 94. H2342I (chul) is the root verb of the chul/chil/chi.lah cluster (56 occurrences); full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 72. H2479 (chal.cha.lah) is the intensive reduplicated form of the chul root; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 96. G0074 (agōnia) is the single-occurrence Gethsemane term (Lk 22:44); full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 99. G3600 (odunaō) spans anguish/distress meanings across Lk 2:48, 16:24-25, Acts 20:38; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 154 (sorrow), wa_term_inventory id 458. G5604 (ōdin) covers birth-pang/labour-pang metaphors (Mt 24:8, Mk 13:8, Acts 2:24, 1Th 5:3); full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.

XREF: primary analysis in registry 005 (anguish), wa_term_inventory id 101. G0928 (basanizō) is the verbal form of the basanos root; full word analysis, verse records and phase2 flags should be drawn from that registry.
